specific_question: What percentage of Elexion Automotive's customer satisfaction complaints were related to infotainment connectivity issues in 2024?
answer: In Q3 2024, 30% of Elexion Automotive's customer satisfaction complaints were related to infotainment connectivity issues, making it the second-highest complaint category after charging speed concerns.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive's quality assurance testing protocols prioritize Apple CarPlay and Android Auto connectivity performance by Q4 2025 for 2026 EV models to differentiate from competitors and attract 50% of Apple users and 42% of Samsung users who depend on smartphone connections every drive?
